recipe.title: One-pan fabulous fish
recipe.description: This fabulous one-pan fish recipe is the ultimate midweek meal – just 5 simple ingredients and 15 minutes to prepare, it's so good!

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh basil
white fish fillets
ingredients.note: such as haddock, skin off, pin-boned, from sustainable sources

steps.descr: In a large shallow casserole pan on a high heat, mix the...
steps.instructions: In a large shallow casserole pan on a high heat, mix the rice with 2 heaped teaspoons of tapenade, then pour over 600ml of water.

on_enter.say: In a large shallow casserole pan on a high heat, mix the rice with 2 heaped teaspoons of tapenade, then pour over 600ml of water.

steps.descr: Put the lid on and let it come to the boil while you...
steps.instructions: Put the lid on and let it come to the boil while you halve the tomatoes and, in a bowl, mix them with 1 tablespoon each of olive oil and red wine vinegar.

on_enter.say: Put the lid on and let it come to the boil while you halve the tomatoes and, in a bowl, mix them with 1 tablespoon each of olive oil and red wine vinegar.

steps.descr: Taste, season to perfection with sea salt and black...
steps.instructions: Taste, season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper, and tear in most of the basil leaves.

on_enter.say: Taste, season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper, and tear in most of the basil leaves.

steps.descr: Cut the fish into four equal-sized pieces and place in...
steps.instructions: Cut the fish into four equal-sized pieces and place in the pan, pushing them into the rice.

on_enter.say: Cut the fish into four equal-sized pieces and place in the pan, pushing them into the rice.

steps.instructions: Scatter over the dressed tomatoes. Put the lid back on and boil for 10 minutes, or until the rice is cooked through, then remove the lid and cook for a further 2 minutes until all the liquid has evaporated.

on_enter.say: Scatter over the dressed tomatoes. Put the lid back on and boil for 10 minutes, or until the rice is cooked through, then remove the lid and cook for a further 2 minutes until all the liquid has evaporated.

steps.descr: Spoon the remaining tapenade over the fish, pick over...
steps.instructions: Spoon the remaining tapenade over the fish, pick over the remaining basil leaves, drizzle lightly with extra virgin olive oil, and dish up.

on_enter.say: Spoon the remaining tapenade over the fish, pick over the remaining basil leaves, drizzle lightly with extra virgin olive oil, and dish up.
